title: Hud+ (beta)
description: Hud+ will change the game's HUD and make it more modern.
body:
### Description
**Hud+** will change the game's HUD and make it more modern. The original indicators will be replaced with minimalist divisions, and all menus will switch to a dark theme

### Disclaimer
**Hud+ (beta)** is still under development
**Hud+ (beta)** is kind of a remake of OG | Fresh Hud
